side_effects.description: No noticeable hunger pangs from Ipamorelin and Sermorelin (expected to be common side effect)

protocol_notes: User from Belfast. Had severe wrist injury 1 month ago: torn ligaments, dislocated, broke radius, pulled ligament off bone. Surgery 11 days after injury with 2 wires, plate for radius, anchors for ligaments, 2 screws. Surgery was 2 weeks prior to post. Used BPC and TB-500 for 10 days from uk-peptides.com. Added Ipamorelin and Sermorelin to maintain physique while unable to train, but got no noticeable hunger pangs. Later research suggested uk-peptides might be scammers. User concerned about wasted time and missed healing window.
